description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a flat, wood-textured tabletop and sturdy, angular metal legs. The tabletop appears to be made of a dark laminate or veneer with subtle wood grain patterns, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. The legs are constructed from black metal, forming a geometric frame that provides stability and a minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or additional attachments, emphasizing a clean and functional design. The desk is of standard height, suitable for sitting and working with a chair. Its robust construction and neutral color palette make it versatile for various urban environments such as offices, co-working spaces, or public study areas.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a dark wood-textured top and black metal legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design. The desk is clean, functional, and free of attachments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, highlighting the flat tabletop and the angular black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the desk's narrow profile and the thickness of the tabletop, with the metal frame visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the desk, mirroring the front but with the support structure of the legs more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length and edge detail of the tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The long side with the open leg space is intended to face the user, providing ample room for seating and leg movement; the desk has no drawers or distinguishing front features.
